movie.title: Devil's Double Next Level (2025) [Hindi ORG] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: A well-known movie critic is invited by a strange person to watch a special horror film. But once the movie starts, he finds himself trapped inside it. The world keeps shifting timelines, endless day-to-night cycles, non-linear narration, and scary things from horror movies come to life. To escape, he must either stop reviewing movies forever or find a way to defeat the ghost that trapped him.
